message:
feat(franken-node): add mission contracts, claim gating, and full conformance/compatibility test harnesses

Introduce the FrankenNode subsystem's formal contract layer and its
comprehensive validation infrastructure. FrankenNode defines the boundary
between the Rust pi agent and the legacy Node.js/Bun runtime for
extension-host drop-in and full-runtime replacement scenarios.

Contract documents (docs/):
- franken-node-mission-contract.json: top-level mission statement, claim
  tiers (extension_host_dropin vs full_runtime_replacement), forbidden
  claims, and release claim policy tied to bead bd-3ar8v.7.1
- franken-node-claim-gating-contract.json: overclaim prevention rules,
  required evidence artifacts, audit log schema, and per-tier blocking
  reason taxonomy (schema pi.frankennode.claim_gating_contract.v1)
- franken-node-executable-conformance-harness-contract.json: defines the
  executable conformance harness interface for verifying runtime parity
  (schema pi.frankennode.executable_conformance_harness_contract.v1)
- franken-node-kernel-extraction-boundary-manifest.json: kernel extraction
  boundary surface enumeration — which Node.js APIs are in scope for each
  claim tier (schema pi.frankennode.kernel_extraction_boundary_manifest.v1)
- franken-node-semantic-compatibility-matrix-contract.json: semantic compat
  matrix defining pass/fail/partial for each API surface against each
  runtime target (schema pi.frankennode.semantic_compatibility_matrix_contract.v1)

Test harnesses (tests/):
- franken_node_claim_contract.rs: validates claim gating contract schema,
  tier structure, overclaim blockers, required evidence, and audit log
- franken_node_compat_harness.rs: executable conformance harness exercising
  Node.js API surfaces (CJS require, ESM import, event loop, builtins,
  error diagnostics) via fixture scripts in tests/franken_node_compat/fixtures/
- franken_node_executable_conformance_harness_contract.rs: validates the
  harness contract document's schema, required fields, and structural invariants
- franken_node_kernel_extraction_boundary_manifest.rs: validates kernel
  extraction boundary manifest completeness and tier coverage
- franken_node_semantic_compat_contract.rs: validates semantic compat matrix
  structure, cell coverage, and cross-references against boundary manifest

Modified tests:
- qa_docs_policy_validation.rs: added franken-node mission contract schema,
  tier, and forbidden-claim validation gates
- release_evidence_gate.rs: added 264-line franken-node claim gating
  contract validator with tier validation, overclaim blocker checks,
  evidence artifact verification, and audit log field requirements
- suite_classification.toml: registered franken_node_claim_contract,
  franken_node_kernel_extraction_boundary_manifest, and
  franken_node_semantic_compat_contract in the integration test suite

E2E pipeline (scripts/e2e/run_all.sh):
- Added FRANKEN_NODE_CLAIM_TIER environment variable passthrough to the
  Python evidence validation engine
- Added 510-line franken-node mission contract validation block covering
  schema verification, tier gate evaluation, forbidden claim scanning,
  and claim-gate status artifact emission

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,111 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.frankennode.claim_gating_contract.v1",
+  "contract_version": "1.0.0",
+  "bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.1",
+  "support_bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.1.1",
+  "status": "active_blocking_policy",
+  "effective_date_utc": "2026-02-17T07:18:00Z",
+  "mission_statement": "FrankenNode must use machine-verifiable claim tiers and hard release gates so extension-host parity progress cannot be overstated as full Node/Bun replacement.",
+  "scope": {
+    "target_project_root": "/dp/franken_node",
+    "upstream_comparison_targets": [
+      "Node.js",
+      "Bun"
+    ],
+    "non_goals": [
+      "Do not claim strict Node/Bun replacement when certification evidence is incomplete.",
+      "Do not publish full-runtime parity language for extension-host-only milestones."
+    ]
+  },
+  "claim_tiers": [
+    {
+      "tier_id": "TIER-1-EXTENSION-HOST-PARITY",
+      "label": "Extension-host parity",
+      "allowed_claim_language": [
+        "Extension-hosting parity scope only",
+        "Validated extension-runtime compatibility subset"
+      ],
+      "required_evidence": [
+        "extension conformance reports",
+        "capability policy conformance",
+        "security policy invariants"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_claim_language": [
+        "Full Node/Bun replacement",
+        "General-purpose runtime parity"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "tier_id": "TIER-2-TARGETED-RUNTIME-PARITY",
+      "label": "Targeted runtime parity",
+      "allowed_claim_language": [
+        "Targeted runtime parity for explicitly listed workloads",
+        "Matched-state parity for declared compatibility matrix rows"
+      ],
+      "required_evidence": [
+        "compatibility matrix with executable conformance harness",
+        "resource-budget benchmark evidence",
+        "security and replay reliability evidence"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_claim_language": [
+        "Strict drop-in replacement for all Node/Bun workloads"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "tier_id": "TIER-3-FULL-NODE-BUN-REPLACEMENT",
+      "label": "Full Node/Bun replacement",
+      "allowed_claim_language": [
+        "Full replacement claim is allowed only when all hard gates are certified"
+      ],
+      "required_evidence": [
+        "unified certification stack pass across unit/e2e/conformance/security/perf",
+        "benchmark and resource gate pass with confidence-tagged evidence",
+        "migration assistant and shadow-canary rollback safeguards",
+        "crate reintegration evidence into pi_agent_rust"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_claim_language": [
+        "Replacement claim when any hard gate is missing",
+        "Replacement claim with stale or missing verdict artifacts"
+      ]
+    }
+  ],
+  "forbidden_claim_patterns": [
+    "strict drop-in replacement for Node/Bun",
+    "fully Node-compatible and Bun-compatible without qualification",
+    "production-ready full runtime replacement without certification"
+  ],
+  "claim_gate_policy": {
+    "release_claim_gate_mode": "hard_fail_if_unmet",
+    "strict_replacement_requires": {
+      "overall_verdict": "CERTIFIED",
+      "required_artifacts": [
+        "tests/full_suite_gate/franken_node_claim_verdict.json",
+        "tests/full_suite_gate/practical_finish_checkpoint.json"
+      ]
+    },
+    "overclaim_blockers": [
+      "missing_required_evidence",
+      "open_critical_gap",
+      "missing_or_stale_verdict_artifact",
+      "forbidden_claim_phrase_detected"
+    ]
+  },
+  "future_crate_reintegration_obligations": {
+    "required_bead": "bd-3ar8v.7.13",
+    "obligations": [
+      "Integrate franken_node runtime crate(s) into pi_agent_rust.",
+      "Retire duplicate runtime logic after reintegration verification.",
+      "Retain parity and certification gates post-reintegration."
+    ]
+  },
+  "structured_logging_contract": {
+    "required_fields": [
+      "run_id",
+      "tier_id",
+      "decision",
+      "blocking_reasons",
+      "evidence_refs",
+      "timestamp_utc"
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.frankennode.executable_conformance_harness_contract.v1",
+  "contract_version": "1.0.0",
+  "bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.3",
+  "support_bead_id": "bd-1ec8w",
+  "status": "active_blocking_policy",
+  "effective_date_utc": "2026-02-17T07:31:00Z",
+  "mission_statement": "FrankenNode compatibility claims must be backed by executable row-level conformance runs against Node and Bun with fail-closed verdict derivation and evidence lineage.",
+  "harness_execution_policy": {
+    "execution_mode": "fail_closed",
+    "required_runtime_targets": [
+      "franken-node",
+      "node",
+      "bun"
+    ],
+    "required_oracle_pairings": [
+      "franken-node-vs-node",
+      "franken-node-vs-bun"
+    ],
+    "required_row_fields": [
+      "run_id",
+      "correlation_id",
+      "scenario_id",
+      "fixture_id",
+      "runtime_target",
+      "oracle_target",
+      "verdict",
+      "artifact_path",
+      "captured_at_utc"
+    ],
+    "allowed_row_verdicts": [
+      "EXACT_PARITY",
+      "ACCEPTABLE_SUPERSET",
+      "PARTIAL_PARITY",
+      "INCOMPATIBLE",
+      "ERROR"
+    ]
+  },
+  "verdict_derivation_policy": {
+    "required_summary_fields": [
+      "run_id",
+      "correlation_id",
+      "summary_verdict",
+      "high_criticality_incompatible_count",
+      "lineage_missing_count",
+      "error_row_count",
+      "generated_at_utc"
+    ],
+    "release_block_rules": {
+      "high_criticality_incompatible_blocks_release": true,
+      "lineage_missing_blocks_release": true,
+      "error_rows_block_release": true,
+      "missing_or_stale_summary_blocks_release": true
+    }
+  },
+  "release_blockers": [
+    "Missing executable rows for any declared high-criticality scenario",
+    "Missing Node/Bun oracle pairing for any executed scenario",
+    "Any high-criticality row with INCOMPATIBLE verdict",
+    "Any row without run_id or correlation_id lineage",
+    "Any summary verdict derived from stale or partial evidence"
+  ],
+  "downstream_dependencies": {
+    "blocked_beads": [
+      "bd-3ar8v.7.4",
+      "bd-3ar8v.7.5",
+      "bd-3ar8v.7.8",
+      "bd-3ar8v.7.11",
+      "bd-3ar8v.7.14"
+    ],
+    "integration_contracts": [
+      "docs/franken-node-semantic-compatibility-matrix-contract.json",
+      "docs/franken-node-claim-gating-contract.json"
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,222 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.frankennode.kernel_extraction_boundary_manifest.v1",
+  "contract_version": "1.0.0",
+  "bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.2",
+  "support_bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.2.1",
+  "status": "active_blocking_policy",
+  "effective_date_utc": "2026-02-17T00:00:00Z",
+  "source_project_root": "/data/projects/pi_agent_rust",
+  "target_project_root": "/dp/franken_node",
+  "boundary_domains": [
+    {
+      "domain_id": "reactor_scheduler",
+      "target_crate": "franken-kernel-reactor",
+      "current_modules": [
+        "src/scheduler.rs"
+      ],
+      "target_modules": [
+        "franken_kernel_reactor::scheduler"
+      ],
+      "invariants": [
+        "deterministic scheduler ordering",
+        "bounded queue progression",
+        "fallback path emits structured diagnostics"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_cross_boundary_refs": [
+        "must not import session persistence internals",
+        "must not depend on provider-specific runtime adapters"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "domain_id": "hostcall_queueing",
+      "target_crate": "franken-kernel-hostcall-queue",
+      "current_modules": [
+        "src/hostcall_queue.rs",
+        "src/hostcall_s3_fifo.rs"
+      ],
+      "target_modules": [
+        "franken_kernel_hostcall_queue::queue",
+        "franken_kernel_hostcall_queue::s3_fifo"
+      ],
+      "invariants": [
+        "queue fairness contract",
+        "bounded memory under backpressure",
+        "policy decision traceability"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_cross_boundary_refs": [
+        "must not reach into JS runtime internals",
+        "must not mutate session index storage directly"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "domain_id": "hostcall_execution",
+      "target_crate": "franken-kernel-hostcall-exec",
+      "current_modules": [
+        "src/hostcall_amac.rs",
+        "src/hostcall_io_uring_lane.rs",
+        "src/hostcall_superinstructions.rs",
+        "src/hostcall_trace_jit.rs",
+        "src/hostcall_rewrite.rs"
+      ],
+      "target_modules": [
+        "franken_kernel_hostcall_exec::amac",
+        "franken_kernel_hostcall_exec::io_uring",
+        "franken_kernel_hostcall_exec::superinstructions",
+        "franken_kernel_hostcall_exec::trace_jit",
+        "franken_kernel_hostcall_exec::rewrite"
+      ],
+      "invariants": [
+        "semantic parity across execution tiers",
+        "deterministic deopt and fallback behavior",
+        "policy gates remain fail-closed"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_cross_boundary_refs": [
+        "must not bypass hostcall queue policy checks",
+        "must not import CLI presentation code"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "domain_id": "extension_dispatch",
+      "target_crate": "franken-kernel-extension-bridge",
+      "current_modules": [
+        "src/extension_dispatcher.rs",
+        "src/extensions.rs"
+      ],
+      "target_modules": [
+        "franken_kernel_extension_bridge::dispatcher",
+        "franken_kernel_extension_bridge::policy"
+      ],
+      "invariants": [
+        "capability policy enforcement unchanged",
+        "dispatch telemetry includes run lineage",
+        "bridge errors remain classifiable"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_cross_boundary_refs": [
+        "must not contain provider transport code",
+        "must not own session persistence schema"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "domain_id": "extension_runtime_js",
+      "target_crate": "franken-kernel-runtime-js",
+      "current_modules": [
+        "src/extensions_js.rs"
+      ],
+      "target_modules": [
+        "franken_kernel_runtime_js::runtime"
+      ],
+      "invariants": [
+        "hostcall ABI compatibility",
+        "sandbox policy parity",
+        "runtime diagnostics preserved"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_cross_boundary_refs": [
+        "must not include file-system capability escalation paths",
+        "must not pull in session tree mutation code"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "domain_id": "session_orchestration",
+      "target_crate": "franken-kernel-session",
+      "current_modules": [
+        "src/session.rs",
+        "src/session_metrics.rs",
+        "src/session_index.rs"
+      ],
+      "target_modules": [
+        "franken_kernel_session::store",
+        "franken_kernel_session::metrics",
+        "franken_kernel_session::index"
+      ],
+      "invariants": [
+        "append and rewrite consistency",
+        "index/cache coherence",
+        "structured replay metadata preservation"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_cross_boundary_refs": [
+        "must not own extension execution policy decisions",
+        "must not import CLI rendering state"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "domain_id": "context_and_diagnostics",
+      "target_crate": "franken-kernel-context",
+      "current_modules": [
+        "src/agent_cx.rs"
+      ],
+      "target_modules": [
+        "franken_kernel_context::agent_cx"
+      ],
+      "invariants": [
+        "capability context remains explicit",
+        "diagnostic lineage continuity",
+        "context serialization is deterministic"
+      ],
+      "forbidden_cross_boundary_refs": [
+        "must not contain provider request construction",
+        "must not own benchmark report generation"
+      ]
+    }
+  ],
+  "deferred_modules": [
+    {
+      "module_path": "src/provider.rs",
+      "reason": "Provider abstraction remains in pi_agent_rust until semantic/runtime parity gates are complete.",
+      "follow_up_bead": "bd-3ar8v.7.3"
+    },
+    {
+      "module_path": "src/providers/mod.rs",
+      "reason": "Provider factory reintegration depends on post-parity runtime crate boundaries.",
+      "follow_up_bead": "bd-3ar8v.7.13"
+    }
+  ],
+  "ownership_rules": {
+    "require_full_module_coverage": true,
+    "disallow_duplicate_module_ownership": true,
+    "require_explicit_deferred_modules": true,
+    "banned_cross_boundary_pairs": [
+      {
+        "from_domain": "hostcall_execution",
+        "to_domain": "session_orchestration",
+        "reason": "execution lanes must use queue and context interfaces, not direct session mutation"
+      },
+      {
+        "from_domain": "extension_runtime_js",
+        "to_domain": "provider_runtime",
+        "reason": "JS runtime must stay transport-agnostic"
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "drift_detection_contract": {
+    "required_checks": [
+      "kernel_boundary.all_modules_mapped_or_deferred",
+      "kernel_boundary.no_duplicate_domain_ownership",
+      "kernel_boundary.banned_cross_boundary_pairs_absent",
+      "kernel_boundary.reintegration_target_list_complete"
+    ],
+    "report_artifact": "tests/full_suite_gate/franken_node_kernel_boundary_drift_report.json",
+    "failure_policy": "hard_fail"
+  },
+  "reintegration_linkage": {
+    "required_bead": "bd-3ar8v.7.13",
+    "replacement_targets": [
+      "src/agent_cx.rs",
+      "src/hostcall_queue.rs",
+      "src/hostcall_amac.rs",
+      "src/scheduler.rs",
+      "src/extensions.rs",
+      "src/extensions_js.rs",
+      "src/session.rs"
+    ]
+  },
+  "structured_logging_contract": {
+    "required_fields": [
+      "run_id",
+      "domain_id",
+      "module_path",
+      "decision",
+      "reason",
+      "timestamp_utc"
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,96 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.franken_node.mission_contract.v1",
+  "bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.1",
+  "contract_version": "1.0.0",
+  "effective_date_utc": "2026-02-17T00:00:00Z",
+  "status": "active_blocking_policy",
+  "mission_statement": "FrankenNode reuses Pi Rust's certified extension-host runtime core first, with explicit claim tiers that prevent over-claiming full Node/Bun runtime replacement before strict evidence gates are satisfied.",
+  "scope_boundaries": {
+    "extension_host_dropin": {
+      "status": "in_scope_now",
+      "description": "Drop-in parity scope is limited to extension-hosting workloads validated by PERF-3X claim-integrity evidence.",
+      "allowed_language": [
+        "extension-host drop-in parity",
+        "certified extension runtime core"
+      ]
+    },
+    "full_runtime_replacement": {
+      "status": "blocked_until_certified",
+      "description": "Strict Node/Bun runtime replacement language remains blocked until drop-in certification verdict is CERTIFIED and declared phase-6 runtime beads are complete.",
+      "blocked_language": [
+        "strict drop-in replacement for Node.js",
+        "strict drop-in replacement for Bun",
+        "full Node/Bun runtime replacement is complete"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "claim_tiers": [
+    {
+      "tier_id": "extension_host_dropin",
+      "claim_label": "Extension-host drop-in parity",
+      "allowed": true,
+      "required_evidence_artifacts": [
+        "tests/perf/reports/baseline_variance_confidence.json",
+        "tests/perf/reports/extension_benchmark_stratification.json",
+        "tests/perf/reports/phase1_matrix_validation.json",
+        "tests/perf/reports/parameter_sweeps.json",
+        "tests/e2e_results/<run>/claim_integrity_scenario_cell_status.json",
+        "tests/e2e_results/<run>/claim_integrity_evidence_adjudication_matrix.json"
+      ],
+      "required_check_ids": [
+        "claim_integrity.realistic_session_shape_coverage",
+        "claim_integrity.microbench_only_claim",
+        "claim_integrity.global_claim_missing_partition_coverage",
+        "claim_integrity.unresolved_conflicting_claims",
+        "claim_integrity.evidence_adjudication_matrix_schema",
+        "claim_integrity.franken_node_requested_claim_tier_allowed"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "tier_id": "full_runtime_replacement",
+      "claim_label": "Strict Node/Bun runtime replacement",
+      "allowed": false,
+      "required_beads": [
+        "bd-3ar8v.7.2",
+        "bd-3ar8v.7.3",
+        "bd-3ar8v.7.4"
+      ],
+      "required_evidence_artifacts": [
+        "docs/dropin-certification-verdict.json",
+        "docs/franken-node-kernel-extraction-boundary-manifest.json",
+        "tests/full_suite_gate/franken_node_kernel_boundary_drift_report.json"
+      ],
+      "required_check_ids": [
+        "claim_integrity.franken_node_strict_replacement_dropin_certified",
+        "claim_integrity.franken_node_phase6_runtime_beads_declared"
+      ],
+      "blocking_reason": "Strict runtime-replacement claims remain blocked until drop-in verdict is CERTIFIED and phase-6 runtime interoperability beads are complete."
+    }
+  ],
+  "forbidden_claims": [
+    {
+      "claim_id": "strict_dropin_nodejs",
+      "phrase": "strict drop-in replacement for Node.js",
+      "blocked_until_tier": "full_runtime_replacement"
+    },
+    {
+      "claim_id": "strict_dropin_bun",
+      "phrase": "strict drop-in replacement for Bun",
+      "blocked_until_tier": "full_runtime_replacement"
+    },
+    {
+      "claim_id": "full_runtime_replacement_now",
+      "phrase": "full Node/Bun runtime replacement is complete",
+      "blocked_until_tier": "full_runtime_replacement"
+    }
+  ],
+  "release_claim_policy": {
+    "default_allowed_tier": "extension_host_dropin",
+    "strict_claim_tier": "full_runtime_replacement",
+    "strict_claim_verdict_artifact": "docs/dropin-certification-verdict.json",
+    "strict_claim_requires_dropin_verdict": "CERTIFIED",
+    "fail_closed": true,
+    "enforced_by": "scripts/e2e/run_all.sh",
+    "requested_tier_env_var": "FRANKEN_NODE_CLAIM_TIER"
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,141 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.frankennode.semantic_compatibility_matrix_contract.v1",
+  "contract_version": "1.1.0",
+  "bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.3",
+  "support_bead_id": "bd-3ar8v.7.3.1",
+  "status": "active_blocking_policy",
+  "effective_date_utc": "2026-02-17T07:26:30Z",
+  "mission_statement": "FrankenNode semantic compatibility claims must be based on an executable matrix with fail-closed verdict policy and evidence lineage for every scenario row.",
+  "scope": {
+    "target_project_root": "/dp/franken_node",
+    "comparison_targets": [
+      "Node.js",
+      "Bun"
+    ],
+    "matrix_objective": "Declare behavioral compatibility row-by-row and block broad claims when high-criticality rows are missing or incompatible."
+  },
+  "scenario_taxonomy": [
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "SCN-module-resolution-esm-cjs",
+      "domain": "module-resolution",
+      "criticality": "high",
+      "required_surfaces": [
+        "esm",
+        "cjs",
+        "package.exports"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "SCN-node-builtin-apis",
+      "domain": "builtin-apis",
+      "criticality": "high",
+      "required_surfaces": [
+        "fs",
+        "path",
+        "crypto",
+        "process",
+        "timers"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "SCN-event-loop-io-ordering",
+      "domain": "event-loop-io",
+      "criticality": "high",
+      "required_surfaces": [
+        "timers",
+        "microtasks",
+        "io-backpressure"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "SCN-tooling-and-package-workflows",
+      "domain": "tooling-interop",
+      "criticality": "medium",
+      "required_surfaces": [
+        "npm-install",
+        "lockfile-resolution",
+        "script-entrypoints"
+      ]
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "SCN-error-and-diagnostics-parity",
+      "domain": "errors-diagnostics",
+      "criticality": "medium",
